name_es: Museo del Oro Zenu — Coleccion Permanente
title: Museo del Oro Zenu — Coleccion Permanente
description: Museo gratuito del Banco de la Republica inaugurado en 1982. Coleccion de 538 piezas de orfebreria, 61 ceramicas, 12 liticos, 48 conchas y 6 huesos de las principales culturas prehispanicas. Martes a sabado 9am-5pm, domingos 10am-3pm. Cerrado los lunes. Plaza de Bolivar, Centro Historico.
description_en: Free museum by the Bank of the Republic, inaugurated in 1982. Collection of 538 goldwork pieces, 61 ceramics, 12 lithics, 48 shells, and 6 bones from major pre-Hispanic cultures. Tuesday to Saturday 9am-5pm, Sundays 10am-3pm. Closed Mondays. Plaza de Bolivar, Historic Center.
